content.en:
Nine-story building.

When Ye Tian came back, Jiuxuan Dao Ancestor and Dongchen Dao Ancestor asked about the situation as soon as possible.

"Endless Dao Ancestor, how is the Fog Crow?"

Jiuxuan Dao Ancestor asked curiously.

"Killed by me!"

Ye Tian said lightly.

Hearing this, the Nine Xuan Dao Ancestors were immediately overjoyed.

Wu Wu died, and Ye Tian also killed a lot to the enhancement level.

Next, even if Ye Tian didn't make a move, they could all counterattack the Primordial Ancient Sea, destroy those big tribes, and snatch back a large amount of resources.

Soon after, a large number of Dao Ancestors from the Nine-Fold Building, the Ten Dao Mountains, the Demon Sea, the Mysterious Realm, and the Divine Blood Sect invaded the Primordial Ancient Sea.

Although the primordial artifacts of the Primordial Ancient Sea are endless, and even if you kill them, you have to kill them for a long time, but as long as you kill those to the level of reinforcements, there will be no difficulty in the future.

And Ye Tian also made a move, but one-third of the resources he snatched had to go to the Ninth Building.

Naturally, other forces did not dare to oppose this.

I have to say that the resources of the Primordial Ancient Sea are really many, and there are also many treasures.

Those resources can be taken away, but the treasure land can't be taken away.

As a result, the major forces proposed to divide up the territory of the original ancient sea, build ancient cities and branches of the major forces here, and transform the ancient nest and many territories here.

Develop a large number of cultivators in the Primordial Ancient Sea and cultivate more Dao Ancestors.

Of course, they couldn't completely exterminate the Primordial Artifact, but as long as there were enough Dao Ancestors sitting in the Primordial Ancient Sea, there was no need to worry about the Primordial Artifact rising.

As long as the Primordial Artifacts that have reached the Enhancement Rank are killed, then even if the number of Transformation-level Primordial Artifacts is larger, it will not be able to make any waves.

In the following days, the major forces invaded the Primordial Ancient Sea on a large scale, and Ye Tian would occasionally make a move, and each time he made a move, he would inevitably fall to the level of a strengthened object.

Gradually, the primordial ancient sea's supreme enhancement level became less and less, and some were even hidden and still discovered.

And the major tribes perished one by one, and the major forces built huge ancient cities in the Primordial Ancient Sea, with each ancient city as the core, controlling the territory of the Primordial Ancient Sea, and opening up time and space passages.

It will take a long time to completely occupy the Primordial Ancient Sea, but now that the major tribes of the Primordial Ancient Sea are gone, it is only a matter of time before they are completely occupied.

......

Cut off the exclusion zone.

At this time, Soul Elder, Akagi, and others were also very nervous at the enhancement level.

They didn't expect that the original ancient sea would be defeated, and they refused to form an alliance with the Silent Black Sea at the beginning, and now that the Silent Black Sea has won, will it anger them?

"Wuwu was killed!"

The soul elder was a little incredulous, this was a middle-level immeasurable lifeform, and he actually died at the hands of the Endless Dao Ancestor of the Nine-Story Building.

It is said that the Endless Dao Ancestor is still only a primary-level immeasurable lifeform, but he can kill the Fog Wu by leaping over the level, what a terrifying combat power this is!

These supreme strengtheners who cut off the forbidden area have been discussing for a long time, and they can't do anything about it, so they can only take one step at a time, and only hope that the Supreme Nine Ancestors of the Silent Black Sea will not invade them.

Otherwise, if Ye Tian makes a move, he won't be able to cut off the forbidden area.

Ye Tian didn't have the idea of invading and cutting off the forbidden area, after all, he had copied the body of the Soul Splitting Red Beast before, lived in the Broken Forbidden Zone for a long time, and also improved his strength with the help of the resources and treasures of the Forbidden Zone.

Now, the cut-off doesn't help him much, so he doesn't have to take it.

Of course, his Soul Splitting Red Beast copy body had long been annihilated by him.

The years passed.

The Primordial Ancient Sea was gradually transformed by the major forces of the Silent Black Sea, and more and more Dao Ancestors chose to enter the Primordial Ancient Sea to cultivate.

With one more Primordial Ancient Sea, the strength of the cultivators became stronger and stronger, and there were more and more Ninefold Primordial Ancestors.

And this day.

The truncated boundaries have also changed, and they have been promoted to prefecture-level regional boundaries.

In fact, it was not a long time for the truncated area boundary to become a Xuan-level regional boundary, but it seemed that after the crack that led to the true mountain territory of the Truncated Black Mountain appeared, the change in the truncated area boundary became bigger and bigger, and it rapidly transformed and improved.

Therefore, the truncated regional boundary will be promoted to the prefecture-level regional boundary in such a short period of time.

But if you want to cut off the forbidden area and want to become a heaven-level regional boundary, it will not be so easy.

And in order to better practice on the side of the truncated area boundary, Ye Tian spent time transforming the truncated Xuanlou into a truncated Tianlou.

With his strength and status, he could naturally add a heavenly tower, and no Dao Ancestor dared to say anything.

And the Truncated Heavenly Tower, with Ye Tian in charge, is also considered to be one of the safest Heavenly Towers, so many Dao Ancestors and even the Ninefold Origin Ancestors are willing to join the Truncated Heavenly Tower.

......

Time flies, and before you know it, another long time has passed.

Since Ye Tian was not short of resources, his cultivation was not slow, whether it was his life level or cultivation, he was much stronger than in the past, and his overall combat strength had improved by a cut.

Ye Tian originally wanted to quietly cultivate to the limit of the primary-level immeasurable life form, and then go to the intermediate immeasurable life form realm.

But on this day, another crack appeared in the truncated Montenegro.

The key is that this time the crack is bigger, and from the crack there is even a breath that makes Ye Tiandu's heart palpitate.

Swish!

Ye Tian appeared in front of the crack, and did not go over for the first time, but took a closer look.

"It's not the True Mountain Territory on the other side, and it's not even the Xuanqi Territory!"

Ye Tian muttered.

As for where, he didn't know.

"Let's go in and have a look, it's a big deal to lose a copy body!"

So, Ye Tian passed through this crack and went straight over.

......

"Not good!"

As soon as Ye Tian entered a void, he was immediately sealed by layers of sealing power, and the power of his whole body was almost ninety-nine.

Then he fell into a black ocean and then to the bottom of the sea.

And at the bottom of the sea, he saw an incomparably huge monster.

The monster had the body of a minotaur, six arms, and a pair of black wings on its back.

When Ye Tian came to the bottom of the sea, the monster opened his eyes, and a dark pressure descended on Ye Tian's body, as if it made it difficult for him to move.

Ye Tian didn't know what this monster was, but the copy talent could be detected.

Airplanes!

As soon as the copying talent was explored, Ye Tian discovered the identity of this monster.

"Blood!"

And this guy called Raccoon Blood also has an immeasurable ancestral endowment - immortality!

The immeasurable ancestral endowment of immortality is also an immeasurable ancestral endowment that Ye Tian has never had.

As a result, Ye Tian instantly copied this immeasurable ancestral endowment.
